storefront.title: [th-TH] KiX Storefront

storefront.meta.description: [th-TH] Browse and play at thousands of merchant stores on KiX — earn rewards from your favourite brands.
storefront.search.placeholder_hero: [th-TH] Search by store name, category, or location
storefront.hero.title: [th-TH] Discover stores. Play games. Earn rewards.
storefront.hero.lede: [th-TH] Browse thousands of merchant storefronts across Singapore. Play branded mini-games at checkout and unlock real vouchers, free items, and exclusive perks.

storefront.footer.about: [th-TH] KiX is the gamified acquisition platform for local merchants. Discover stores, play to earn, and turn every visit into a reward.
